Title: E2E: Mixed Configuration — Product Section; Variation Section; and Text Section on Same Product
Section: Configurable Products > Variation Section > E2E Mixed Sections
Preconditions: PREREQUISITE: Product must have variations created first (via REST API or admin). Variation section can only reference existing variations — 'Add options' button is disabled in admin until variations exist. Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. Storefront accessible at {{FRONT_URL}}. Standalone option products (VCST4765-PEDALS) and variation products both exist in QA catalog. Registered customer account exists.
Test_Data: admin={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; user={{USER_EMAIL}}; password={{USER_PASSWORD}}; product_name=Test Config Mixed Sections [YYYYMMDD]; sku=MIXED-SECTIONS-[YYYYMMDD]; base_price=$100.00; pedals_option_id=VCST4765-PEDALS
Steps: --- ADMIN --- [AUTH] Login to {{BACK_URL}}; [HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products create product name=Test Config Mixed Sections [YYYYMMDD] SKU=MIXED-SECTIONS-[YYYYMMDD] base_price=$100.00; [HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations with three sections: (1) name=Choose Accessory; type=Product; isRequired=false; options=[VCST4765-PEDALS qty=1]; (2) name=Choose Color; type=Variation; isRequired=true; options=[variation-red-id qty=1; variation-blue-id qty=1]; (3) name=Engraving; type=Text; isRequired=false; [ACT] Publish product; [WAIT] 30-60 seconds for reindex; --- STOREFRONT --- [NAV] Navigate to PDP for Test Config Mixed Sections [YYYYMMDD] at {{FRONT_URL}}; [WAIT] Configure the parameters widget visible; [ASSERT] Three sections visible in widget: Choose Accessory (Product type); Choose Color (Variation type); Engraving (Text type); [ASSERT] Variation section Choose Color visually distinct from Product section Choose Accessory; [ACT] Select an option in Choose Accessory (Product section); [WAIT] Price updates; [ACT] Select Color: Red in Choose Color (Variation section); [WAIT] Price updates again; [ASSERT] Total = $100.00 + accessory extendedPrice + Color: Red extendedPrice; [ACT] Type text Personalized into Engraving field; [ACT] Set quantity to 1; [ACT] Click Add to Cart; [WAIT] Success notification; [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; [ASSERT] Line item shows all three section configurations
Assertions: [DOM] PDP widget renders all three section types without layout errors; [DOM] Product section and Variation section visually distinct (variation properties vs standalone product names); [MATH] Total = base $100.00 + accessory extendedPrice + variation extendedPrice (2 decimal places); [STATE] Cart line item shows all three section details: Choose Accessory option; Choose Color: Red; Engraving: Personalized; [MATH] Cart subtotal arithmetically correct; [STATE] Add to Cart succeeds with required Variation section filled and optional sections partially filled
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] configuration POST 200/201 with all three sections; addItem errors[] empty; [GQL] productConfiguration query returns all three section types including type=Variation; [CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors on PDP with three sections; [NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx on GraphQL; [ADMIN] Order line item (if placed) shows all three configuration sections
Failure_Signals: Widget breaking with three section types present; Variation section rendering identically to Product section; total price calculation incorrect (missing one section surcharge); cart missing one or more section details; addItem errors[] non-empty for mixed configuration
Cleanup: Delete created product and remove cart item after test

Title: E2E: Eventual Consistency — Config Section Price Change Reflected on Storefront Within 120 Seconds
Preconditions: Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. Configurable Hat product exists with a Product section option. Storefront PDP for Configurable Hat accessible. Initial option price known.
Test_Data: admin={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; back_url={{BACK_URL}}; front_url={{FRONT_URL}}; product_url=/products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/@td(CFG_HAT.slug)
Steps: [NAV] In admin: navigate to {{BACK_URL}} > Catalog > Products > Configurable Hat > Configuration tab; [ASSERT] Record current price of the first Product section option (initial_option_price); [ACT] Edit the option price to initial_option_price + $5.00; [SAVE] Save the configuration change; [WAIT] Note exact timestamp T0 of save; [NAV] Immediately navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/@td(CFG_HAT.slug) in storefront; [ASSERT] Check if option price already updated — may still show old price within first 60s (acceptable per BL-CAT-003); [WAIT] 120 seconds from T0; [NAV] Hard reload the storefront PDP; [ACT] Select the edited option; [ASSERT] Observe total price
Assertions: [STATE] Within first 60s: old price may still be shown on storefront (acceptable — within lag window per BL-CAT-003); [STATE] At T0+120s: storefront MUST show new updated option price — old price after 120s is a BL-CROSS-009 violation; [MATH] Total price after option selection = base price + new_option_price (initial + $5.00); [FORMAT] Price formatted to 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] productConfiguration GraphQL query at T0+120s returns updated salePrice for the edited option; [ADMIN] Configuration blade still shows new option price (admin always live); [CONSOLE] No errors on price display
Failure_Signals: Storefront still shows old option price after 120s; total price calculation uses stale price; productConfiguration GraphQL response cached beyond 120s; admin save fails silently
Cleanup: Restore option price to initial value after test

Title: E2E: Add-to-Cart Succeeds for Product Section with No Predefined Options (Dynamic Resolution)
Preconditions: PREREQUISITE: Admin logged in at {{BACK_URL}}. A configurable product exists with a Product-type section that has NO predefined options (empty options[]). Retrieve and record the configurable product ID from Admin > Catalog before execution — substitute into <existing-configurable-product-id> and <product-id> placeholders in Steps. A product resolved dynamically at runtime (e.g., via IsDefault flag) should still be selectable. Storefront accessible at {{FRONT_URL}}. Registered customer account exists.
Test_Data: admin={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; user={{USER_EMAIL}}; password={{USER_PASSWORD}}; back_url={{BACK_URL}}; front_url={{FRONT_URL}}
Steps: --- ADMIN SETUP --- [AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} to obtain admin Bearer token; [HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations with body: { productId: <existing-configurable-product-id>, isActive: true, sections: [{ name: Dynamic Accessory, type: Product, isRequired: false, options: [] }] }; [ASSERT] POST returns 200 or 201; [HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/products/configurations?productId=<product-id>; [ASSERT] Configuration saved with sections[0].options = []; [WAIT] 60s for search index reindex; --- STOREFRONT --- [NAV] Sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} at {{FRONT_URL}}; [NAV] Navigate to PDP for the configurable product; [WAIT] Configure the parameters widget visible; [ASSERT] Dynamic Accessory section renders (may show dynamically resolved product or empty selection); [ACT] If a dynamically resolved product appears in the section — select it; [ACT] Set quantity to 1; [ACT] Click Add to Cart; [WAIT] Success notification or cart update; [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
Assertions: [STATE] Add-to-cart does NOT return 'ProductUnavailableForSection' validation error for dynamically resolved products in empty-options sections; [STATE] Cart line item created successfully; [DOM] Cart page shows the configurable product; [MATH] Cart total includes the configured product price (base + any dynamic option price); [API] getCart GraphQL query returns the item with configurationItems[] present
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] addItem mutation errors[] is empty; [GQL] getCart returns configurationItems with correct sectionId; [CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors on PDP or cart; [NETWORK] No 4xx/5xx errors during add-to-cart flow
Failure_Signals: addItem mutation returns ProductUnavailableForSection error (vacuous truth bug — Options.All() returns true on empty collection); cart empty after add-to-cart attempt; 422 validation error on add-to-cart; PDP widget not rendering the dynamic section
Cleanup: Delete test configuration after test; remove cart item
References: Synced: PR #104 vc-module-x-cart (2026-03-26) — fixes ConfigurationItemValidator vacuous truth bug
